word: G3154 - ματαιόω - mataióō - mat-ah-yo'-o - Become vain

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ματαιόω

- Transliteration: Mataioo

- Phonetic: mat-ah-yo'-o

- Definition:

1. to make empty, vain, foolish

- Origin: from G3152

- TDNT entry: 12:43,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3152; to render (passively become) foolish that is (morally) wicked or (specifically) idolatrous: - become vain.
